against this background that the study therefore assesses the participation, role and significance the rural populace the drafting the <hide> Zimbabwean Constitution.
The study traces the history constitutional reform efforts Zimbabwe, beginning with the colonial Lancaster House Constitution <hide>, the protracted exercise <hide> <hide> which gave birth the current Constitution.
focuses the <hide>-<hide> constitution making process case study.
The study employs interdisciplinary approach adopting both doctrinal an

empirical research approaches.
The study employed the doctrinal research approach provide for doctrinal analysis the relevant global, regional and domestic legislation and case law.
The empirical research approach, through interviews, was used collect qualitative data from the general members the rural populace and key institutions such political parties and human rights organisations from three selected rural districts, namely Bulilima, Makonde and Mutasa.
The study indicated that while significant number the rural populace participated the constitution making process, the legal environment which subsisted during the constitution making process did not allow for the unfettered flow information and ideas, direct result repressive legislation such AIPPA, Criminal Law (Codification and Reform) Act, Interception Communications Act and POSA, among others similar laws, and well the deeply polarised political environment owing the nature the relationship between the ZANU PF-led government and the opposition political parties.

company produce robocall expenditure,” creating and conducting focus group meeting.
But Decision Point Consulting has not filed C-<hide>, spending disclosure statement with the state.

MATH filed form C-<hide> June but this report failed include any the above-described expenditures,” the complaint said.
That C-<hide> report, fact, lists only two things: donations totaling $<hide> and debts $<hide>.
“The failure opponents I-<hide> file any the required financial reports disclose any information about their income sources expenditures represents clear disregard for Montana’s reporting requirements and warrants full and immediate investigation,” the complaint says.

Established <hide>, this historic institution home over <hide> animals <hide> species.
The San Antonio Zoo has been making strides animal care since its inception, being one the first “cageless” zoos the country among other accomplishments.
Beautifully landscaped over gorgeous acres exhibits, gardens, and attractions, the San Antonio Zoo equally devoted offering the public clean, comfortable enjoyment they are dedicated providing the highest standards care for all living things.
Housing one the largest bird collections the country, San Antonio Zoo home birds from all over the globe.
See bananaquits mingle with Congo peacocks, Egyptian plovers, green aracaris, toucans, macaws, and variety North American birds including owls, hawks, eagles, and songbirds.
Equally impressive are the reptile and amphibian centers where you can find poison dart frogs, Japanese giant salamanders, pythons, Armenian vipers, African bullfrogs, Mexican axolotl, and various dangerous creatures from jungles and deserts.
course, American alligators, dwarf caimans, and assortment toothy favorites are also found among the exhibits.
The San Antonio Zoo also notable for its breeding programs among the mammal populations.
